title: Design System: Salah Uddin Selim — Portfolio

display.purpose: Hero headline only, per the strict 48px baseline.

title.purpose: Card titles, subheadings — the 20px scale step.

label.purpose: Monospace instrument-panel voice: tags, badges, stats, code.

shadows.name: ambient-sm
shadows.purpose: Minimal resting elevation for small controls.

shadows.name: ambient-md
shadows.purpose: Default resting elevation for glass-panel cards.

components.name: Primary Button
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; padding: 12px 24px; border-radius: 16px; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; background: #00d9ff; color: #fff; border: 1px solid #00d9ff; transition: all 300ms ease; cursor: pointer; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #33e0ff; box-shadow: 0 0 25px rgba(0,217,255,0.25); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #00d9ff; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; padding: 10px 20px; border-radius: 16px; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; background: transparent; color: #00d9ff; border: 1px solid rgba(0,217,255,0.25); transition: all 300ms ease; cursor: pointer; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: rgba(0,217,255,0.08); border-color: rgba(0,217,255,0.4); box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(0,217,255,0.1); } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #00d9ff; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Hero Button
components.description: One-off high-contrast CTA reserved for the above-the-fold hero only.
components.css: .ds-btn-hero { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 10px; padding: 12px 32px; border-radius: 16px; font-size: 18px; font-weight: 700; background: #fff; color: #050816; border: 2px solid #fff; box-shadow: 0 0 30px rgba(255,255,255,0.15); transition: all 300ms ease; cursor: pointer; } .ds-btn-hero:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.9); box-shadow: 0 0 50px rgba(255,255,255,0.3); }

components.name: Project Card
components.description: Glass-panel grid card that expands into a full project modal.
components.html:
Project Name

Next.jsTypeScript
components.css: .ds-card-project { background: rgba(17,24,39,0.65); backdrop-filter: blur(16px); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06); border-radius: 32px; overflow: hidden; padding: 16px; cursor: pointer; transition: border-color 300ms ease, box-shadow 300ms ease; } .ds-card-project:hover { border-color: rgba(0,217,255,0.15); box-shadow: 0 4px 6px -1px rgba(0,0,0,0.4); } .ds-card-project-thumb { height: 240px; width: 100%; border-radius: 10px; background: #0b1120; margin-bottom: 12px; } .ds-card-project-title { font-family: Poppins, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 20px; color: #fff; margin: 0 0 8px; }

components.name: Tag / Chip
components.description: Monospace instrument-readout tag used for skills, categories, stats.
components.css: .ds-tag { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 4px 12px; border-radius: 9999px; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.05em; background: rgba(0,217,255,0.1); color: #00d9ff; border: 1px solid rgba(0,217,255,0.1); transition: border-color 200ms, background 200ms, box-shadow 200ms; } .ds-tag:hover { border-color: rgba(0,217,255,0.4); background: rgba(0,217,255,0.16); box-shadow: 0 0 12px rgba(0,217,255,0.2); }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Contact form field styled to match the glass-panel system.
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; padding: 10px 16px; border-radius: 10px; background: rgba(17,24,39,0.65); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06); color: #fff; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; transition: border-color 200ms ease; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #c8d8e8; opacity: 0.7; } .ds-input:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #00d9ff; outline-offset: 2px; border-color: rgba(0,217,255,0.4); }

components.name: Navigation Bar
components.description: Fixed top navigation, z-50, sits above page content.
components.html:
S.
ProjectsCredentials
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; padding: 16px 24px; background: rgba(5,8,22,0.8); backdrop-filter: blur(16px); border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06); } .ds-nav-logo { font-family: Poppins, sans-serif; font-weight: 700; color: #fff; } .ds-nav-links { display: flex; gap: 24px; } .ds-nav-link { font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; color: #fff; text-decoration: none; transition: color 150ms ease; } .ds-nav-link:hover { color: #00d9ff; }

narrative.overview:
This is not a portfolio dressed up with a space theme — it's an instrument panel that happens to hold a portfolio. Every surface reads as a pane in a dark control system: near-black voids, hairline borders, glass-panel cards, and a single cyan signal color doing the work of drawing the eye. The nebula glow and starfield aren't wallpaper; they're the ambient hum of a system that's alive. Futuristic, immersive, bold — the visual identity is the pitch, proof that the person who built this can make motion, glassmorphism, and depth behave under real engineering discipline (fps-capped canvases, compositor-aware blur, viewport-gated third-party scripts) rather than dragging the page down.

The system explicitly rejects the generic SaaS-template look — no cream/sand backgrounds, no gradient text, no hero-metric blocks, no tiny uppercase eyebrows scaffolding every section. It also rejects the overly corporate agency-portfolio register (stock-photo safe, forgettable) and gimmicky 3D-tech-demo sites where effects overwhelm the content they're supposed to frame. Everything here is legible first, spectacular second.
keyCharacteristics: Near-black void background (#050816) with a secondary nebula tone (#0b1120) for layered depth, never a lighter 'card gray'
One accent does the signaling: cyan (#00d9ff) for primary actions, focus, and links; violet (#8b5cf6) reserved for secondary/complementary accents
Glass-panel surfaces: translucent dark backgrounds with backdrop blur and a barely-visible hairline border, not opaque flat cards
Generous, large-radius geometry (16-40px) on containers; small radius (6-10px) on tight controls
Monospace type appears only where it signals 'system data': labels, tags, code, stats — never body copy

rules.name: The One Signal Rule
rules.body: Cyan (#00d9ff) is the only color allowed to mean 'click me' or 'this is active.' Violet, success-green, and warning-yellow carry their own distinct meanings and must never substitute for cyan's role.

rules.name: The Glass, Not Gray Rule
rules.body: Container surfaces are never a flat opaque gray. They are the void background showing through a translucent, blurred panel with a hairline border.

rules.name: The Strict Scale Rule
rules.body: The type scale is fixed at 16px body / 20px subheading / 32px heading / 48px hero. Don't introduce arbitrary in-between sizes.

rules.name: The Glow-Over-Shadow Rule
rules.body: Interactive elevation is communicated with colored glow (accent-tinted box-shadow at low opacity), not by darkening a gray shadow.

dos: Do use #00d9ff cyan as the only 'this is interactive/active' signal color across the entire site.
Do build containers as translucent glass panels (rgba(17,24,39,0.65) + blur + hairline border), never flat opaque gray cards.
Do use colored glow (box-shadow in the accent hue at low opacity) for hover/elevation states instead of plain darkening shadows.
Do cap body prose at 65-75ch and reserve monospace type for labels, tags, stats, and code — never for body copy.
Do cap fps and viewport-gate any continuous canvas/animation loop or third-party script; every visual effect must earn its frame budget.
Do swap to a solid/near-opaque background on any backdrop-filter: blur() element while it's actively resizing.
donts: Don't introduce cream/sand/warm-neutral backgrounds, gradient text, hero-metric blocks, or tiny uppercase eyebrow labels.
Don't design toward a safe, stock-photo, indistinguishable-from-every-freelancer agency-portfolio look.
Don't let visual effects overwhelm content or usability — no gimmicky 3D-tech-demo excess.
Don't use .btn-hero's white-on-void styling anywhere except the single above-the-fold hero CTA.
Don't place any colored border-left/border-right accent stripe on cards or list items.
Don't stack z-40/z-50 on anything meant to render above the fixed navbar; use z-[60]/z-[70].
Don't skip the prefers-reduced-motion fallback on new animated or canvas-driven components.
